title: Bee Removal in Jericho, Long Island | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Jericho, Long Island. Safe, humane bee hive removal from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Jericho, Long Island, protecting homes and businesses from unwanted bee colonies. Our licensed technicians safely remove bee hives and nests while prioritizing humane relocation whenever possible. With competitive pricing from $350 to $550, we deliver fast, effective bee removal solutions tailored to Jericho's unique residential and commercial properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Jericho and surrounding Long Island communities with safe, effective bee removal services. Our certified technicians use industry-leading techniques and equipment to ensure complete hive removal while minimizing risk to your property and family.
localContext: Jericho's beautiful tree-lined neighborhoods and proximity to parks like Cantiague Park create ideal habitats for bee colonies in chimneys, wall voids, and attic spaces. From the historic homes near the Jericho Cider Mill to modern properties along Jericho Turnpike, our team understands the unique pest control needs of this established Long Island community.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Jericho typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size and location of the hive, accessibility, and structural involvement required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Jericho?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal services throughout Jericho and Long Island. Most bee hive removals are completed within 2-4 hours, though larger colonies or those in difficult-to-access areas may require additional time.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation, working with local beekeepers to safely transfer honeybee colonies. For aggressive species or situations where relocation isn't feasible, we use targeted treatments that protect your property while minimizing environmental impact.

faqs.question: Will bees return after removal?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive bee removal service includes complete hive extraction, honeycomb removal, and treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation. We also provide exclusion recommendations to seal entry points and ensure bees don't return to your Jericho property.
